name: open-agent
description: Open-source AI agent framework with tool use and memory
desc_en: An open-source AI agent framework supporting tool use, memory, and multi-step reasoning.
desc_zh: 支援工具使用與多步驟推理的開源 AI 代理框架。

name: diffusion-studio
description: Browser-based diffusion model image generation studio
desc_en: Browser-based image generation studio powered by diffusion models, no installation needed.
desc_zh: 無需安裝、直接在瀏覽器中使用擴散模型生成圖像的創作工具。

name: claude-tools
description: Collection of utilities and wrappers for Claude API integration
desc_en: A collection of utilities and wrappers to simplify Claude API integration in any project.
desc_zh: 簡化 Claude API 整合的實用工具與封裝庫集合。

name: gpt-commit
description: Auto-generate conventional git commit messages with GPT
desc_en: CLI tool that auto-generates conventional git commit messages using GPT.
desc_zh: 利用 GPT 自動生成符合慣例的 Git 提交訊息的命令列工具。

name: vscode-ai-review
description: VS Code extension for AI-powered code review and suggestions
desc_en: VS Code extension that provides AI-powered code review, bug detection, and suggestions.
desc_zh: 提供 AI 驅動程式碼審查、錯誤偵測與建議的 VS Code 擴充套件。

name: termkit
description: Modern CLI toolkit for building beautiful terminal UIs in Go
desc_en: Modern Go toolkit for building beautiful, interactive terminal UIs with minimal code.
desc_zh: 用最少程式碼打造精美互動式終端介面的現代 Go 工具包。

name: dataflow-viz
description: Real-time data pipeline visualization and monitoring dashboard
desc_en: Real-time data pipeline visualization and monitoring dashboard with drag-and-drop interface.
desc_zh: 具備拖放介面的即時資料管線視覺化與監控儀表板。

name: chartsmith
description: Declarative data visualization library for React with 50+ chart types
desc_en: Declarative React data visualization library with 50+ chart types and smooth animations.
desc_zh: 提供 50 種以上圖表類型與流暢動畫效果的聲明式 React 視覺化函式庫。

name: querylab
description: Open-source analytics platform — self-hosted alternative to Mixpanel
desc_en: Self-hosted open-source analytics platform, a privacy-friendly alternative to Mixpanel.
desc_zh: 注重隱私的 Mixpanel 開源替代方案，可自行架設的分析平台。

name: shield-proxy
description: Privacy-first HTTP proxy with ad blocking and traffic encryption
desc_en: Privacy-first HTTP proxy with built-in ad blocking, tracking prevention, and traffic encryption.
desc_zh: 內建廣告封鎖、追蹤防護與流量加密的隱私優先 HTTP 代理工具。

name: vaultlock
description: Zero-knowledge encrypted password manager written in Rust
desc_en: Zero-knowledge encrypted password manager with local-first storage and cross-platform sync.
desc_zh: 採用零知識加密的密碼管理器，支援本地優先儲存與跨平台同步。

name: scanright
description: Lightweight static analysis security scanner for CI pipelines
desc_en: Lightweight static analysis security scanner designed for fast integration into CI pipelines.
desc_zh: 專為快速整合 CI 管線設計的輕量級靜態分析安全掃描工具。

name: p5-generative
description: A curated collection of generative art sketches built with p5.js
desc_en: A curated library of generative art sketches and interactive visual experiments using p5.js.
desc_zh: 使用 p5.js 製作的生成藝術草圖與互動視覺實驗精選合集。

name: uiblocks
description: Open-source Figma-to-code UI component system with dark mode
desc_en: Open-source Figma-to-code UI component system with dark mode and full accessibility support.
desc_zh: 支援暗色模式與無障礙功能的 Figma 轉程式碼開源 UI 元件系統。

name: motioncraft
description: Code-driven animation toolkit for creative web experiences
desc_en: Code-driven animation toolkit for building expressive, creative web experiences with ease.
desc_zh: 以程式碼驅動的動畫工具包，輕鬆打造富有表現力的創意網頁體驗。
